revisedPrompt:
Generate exactly one PNG image, 320x180 pixels, single frame only. SNES / SFC-style 16-bit pixel-art JRPG battle background, profile snes16_platformer_v1, preset battle_background_320_180. Crisp low-resolution pixels, no antialiasing blur, consistent saturated spring palette, top-left morning light, one-pixel dark outline only where useful. Opaque background.

Scene: wide parallax battle background for a bright mythical-Japan action RPG field: luminous clear morning sky over peaceful satoyama countryside horizon. Upper two thirds are sky and soft cumulus clouds with painterly SNES-era sky gradients. Horizon sits in the lower third with gentle distant green hills, terraced rice paddies, faint atmospheric haze near the horizon line. Mood is bright, open, hopeful, rich saturated spring sunlight.

Layering requirements: clear foreground ground detail, midground fighting plane, background trees/hills/terraced paddies, far sky and distant mountains. Leave clean readable horizontal actor lanes and enemy lanes across the ground plane with minimal clutter so sprites can stand. Add contact-shadow-ready ground cues and subtle foreground grasses at the edges so sprites feel grounded. Memorable battle stage, not a flat landscape.

Composition constraints: no characters, no enemies, no animals or companion creatures, no birds, no foreground buildings, no UI, no menus, no text, no cursor, no frame borders, no grid lines, no labels, no numbers, no watermark. Keep all art inside the 320x180 image. No detached fragments, no isolated pixel islands, no dust specks, no seam slivers, no leftover residue. Avoid any Mario/Nintendo/Zelda/Final Fantasy/Pokemon/Dragon Quest/Secret of Mana/Okami/Sakuna characters, logos, likenesses, letter emblems, samurai armor, kabuto helmet, ninja outfit, two-sword daisho, guns, modern objects, horror mood, dark gloomy palette.
